title: NEST - 211info
text: WHITE BIRD CLINIC NEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps individuals access primary medical care, case management, advocacy, outpatient drug and alcohol treatment, drug detox, mental health evaluation, counseling, SSI/SSDI assistance from a public benefits specialist, OHP application assistance, and transportation to appointments. 323 E 12th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Individuals experiencing homelessness Hours: Walk in services: Monday-Friday 9:30am-noon Scheduled case management appointments: Monday-Friday 1pm-4:30pm Reception and phone assistance: Monday-Friday 9:30am-3pm Email (541) 342-1295 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 342-1295 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Downtown on 12th Avenue between High Street and Mill Street Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Social Security Issues Case/Care Management * Homelessness Issues Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Detoxification * Homelessness Issues Homeless Transportation Programs Homelessness Advocacy Groups Individual Counseling * Homelessness Issues Mental Health Evaluation * Homelessness Issues Navigator Programs * Homelessness Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CAHOOTS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CRISIS COUNSELING HOTLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WHITE BIRD CLINIC
